metadata.title: TTPortal – Find Your Table. Track Your Game.
metadata.description: The companion app for table tennis players. Discover venues, check in, log your sessions, join events, and connect with players in your city.

footer.tagline: The table tennis companion. Find tables, log sessions, and meet players near you.

cta.trusted: Trusted by table tennis players across Romania

hero.subtitle: Discover table tennis venues, check in at your favourite clubs, log every session, and connect with players around you — all in one place.

features.label: FEATURES
features.title: Everything a table tennis player needs,
features.description: From finding a place to play to tracking every rally you log, TTPortal keeps your table tennis life organized.
features.feature1Description: Browse a map of table tennis clubs and public tables across your city. See opening hours, reviews, and number of tables before you go.
features.feature1Bullet1: Interactive map with every known venue
features.feature1Bullet2: Filter by city, table count, open now, or rating
features.feature1Bullet3: Real reviews and photos from other players
features.feature2Description: A single tap logs that you played. Build a history of every session, see how often you visit each venue, and watch your play time add up.
features.feature2Bullet3: Full play history across all your venues
features.feature3Description: Schedule matches with friends, create open events for your club, or join recurring sessions. Manage attendance, invites, and reminders in one place.
features.feature3Bullet2: Invite friends or make it public
features.feature4Description: Climb the city leaderboards by logging sessions and attending events. Take on monthly challenges and earn badges for consistency.
features.feature4Bullet3: Earn badges as you hit milestones
features.feature5Description: Rate venues on what actually matters — table condition, lighting, pricing, crowd. Help other players find the best spot to play.
features.feature5Bullet2: Add photos of the venue and the tables
features.feature5Bullet3: See reviewer play history for context
features.feature6Description: Keep a log of the rubbers, blades, and balls you play with. Switch setups, note what worked, and share your loadout with friends.
features.feature6Bullet2: History of every setup you've tried
features.feature7Description: Add friends, see who plays where, and discover players at your level. Never show up to an empty table again.
features.feature7Bullet1: Add friends and follow their check-ins
features.feature7Bullet2: See who's active at nearby venues
features.feature7Bullet3: Match with players at your level

secondaryFeatures.title: And much more.
secondaryFeatures.description: Every feature built for the way table tennis players actually play.
secondaryFeatures.friendManagementDesc: Build your circle of playing partners. Add friends, accept invites, and see who's at the table tonight.
secondaryFeatures.smartNotificationsDesc: Get notified about friends checking in, event reminders, challenge progress, and new reviews on your favourite venues.
secondaryFeatures.eventAnalyticsDesc: Claimed venues get a full analytics dashboard — check-ins, peak hours, repeat visitors, and review trends.
secondaryFeatures.privacyFirstDesc: Your play history is yours. Data is never sold. Venues only see aggregated, anonymized insights.
secondaryFeatures.worksEverywhereDesc: Native on iOS and Android. Offline-first check-ins sync when you're back online.
secondaryFeatures.realTimeSyncDesc: Events, check-ins, and leaderboards update instantly for everyone in the session.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.title: Up and playing in 3 steps.
howItWorks.description: Less setup than unfolding a table.
howItWorks.step1Description: Open the map, pick a club or public table near you, and see what's there — hours, reviews, who's playing.
howItWorks.step2Description: One tap logs the session. Your play history, streaks, and city leaderboard updates automatically.
howItWorks.step3Description: Add friends, join events, take on monthly challenges. Table tennis is better together.

landingCta.title: Your next session
landingCta.subtitle: Download TTPortal and find a table tonight.

getStartedModal.title: Get Started with TTPortal
getStartedModal.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to use TTPortal.
getStartedModal.webDescription: Use TTPortal instantly in your web browser.
getStartedModal.apkDescription: Get the Android app (APK) for the best experience.

featureRequests.subtitle: Vote on the features you want most, suggest new ideas, and watch them come to life. Your feedback directly shapes our roadmap.
featureRequests.signInDescription: Use your TTPortal account to vote and suggest features.
featureRequests.signUpDescription: Sign up to start voting and suggesting features.
featureRequests.switchToSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up
featureRequests.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

featureRequests.featureDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the feature you'd like to see...
featureRequests.ctaSubtitle: Every vote and suggestion helps us prioritize what to build next. Sign in and make your voice heard.
